title: Finance Broker Adapter Steward Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for broker adapters, market adapters, schema inventory, and anomaly hooks.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete broker-adapter stewardship work.
Keep adapter outputs source, timestamp, and entity scoped.
Do not treat this reusable template as evidence that broker connectivity is live.
outcomes: Broker and market adapter contracts are stable for consuming finance roles.
Schema inventory and link rules are explicit and reusable.

tasks.text: Schema inventory; link rules for Markets -> Sectors -> Positions.
